channel.title: xmadmx
channel.description: Analogue Auf der Maur online. Order EVEN THE GOOD GIRLS WILL CRY: My 90s Rock Memoir. Followed my bass around the world, then founded

item.title: With queen feline Bella as my witness, advanced copy of the visu...
item.description:
With queen feline Bella as my witness, advanced copy of the visual companion of my memoir, My ‘90s Rock Photographs coming out Sept 8th with @delmonico_books @artbookIn tandem with accompanying major museum exhibit in Toronto @agotorontoPre-sale link in bio and save the date for museum opening … Please!xMx

Original post on Picnob

item.title: EVEN THE GOOD GIRLS WILL CRY OUT NOW WORLDWIDEI lived itI wrote ...
item.description: EVEN THE GOOD GIRLS WILL CRY OUT NOW WORLDWIDEI lived itI wrote itI read itI cried itI AM itGrateful to share my ‘90s Rock Memoir with you today. (Fresh tears on Audiobook)Tears and Time.They weave our worlds.Hold us together.US, Canada, UK, Ireland, East Coast to West Coast, come find me in a city near you …  Memoir and event links to via my linktree and on

item.title: Hello People of the InternetNice to find you here.Starting a dia...
item.description: Hello People of the InternetNice to find you here.Starting a dialogue and breaking the ice today, because there is so much sharing coming around the bend for me in 2026 ——My 90s rock memoir, coming out on my birthday, followed by some travel to find you in person, exploding into a photography book + exhibit and more — in preparation for that, I will be engaging much more here, lifting the hood on what is to come ….xMx

item.title: MAdM Multimedia MetamorphosisMY 90’s ROCK PHOTOGRAPHS, my first ...
item.description:
MAdM Multimedia MetamorphosisMY 90’s ROCK PHOTOGRAPHS, my first major museum exhibition debuts at the Art Gallery of Toronto @agotoronto this fall opening Sept 2, in tandem with the Delmonico / DAP book release on Sept 8 and book signing to follow on Sept 9 at 6pm (see bio for links)!Announcing the bonus track: Out of the messy sonic and video archives is an installation and exhibition soundtrack, featuring never before shared ‘90s good girl homemade 4-track demos…BASS WOMB ROOM:My ‘90s 4-Track Demos x Field RecordingsAn Ode to: The Bass x The WombThe Crowd x The CosmosThe Infinite ExchangeFragmented FlashbacksDream Within a DreamThe Mirror Pyramid as Sacred Chamber for Fractured ReflectionAn Invitation to Step Within Why now? Why not? In my 90s Rock memoir I share my most personal stories, my photographs bare behind the scenes, breasts and bloody noses, so no better time to share the quiet shy experimental sounds inside from the time. Early song sketches, sound experiments … inside out.BASS WOMB ROOM embraces the bass (“the mother of all instruments” SHE says) and the womb we all come from….out on Envision Records September 4!Speaking of Humans, Please Note:It’s an honor and privilege to share art with you, one amplified by the burning troubles around us. My 2026 offerings are in the name of lost worlds…. analog ways of being yes, but further enhanced by the profound grief of WORLDS LOST IN REAL-TIME TODAY: Raging fires, bombs on children during “ceasefires”, and destruction of forests and families, all in a continuum of serving corporate greed over human beings.Question everythingListen to MothersDemand PeaceMeet Me in the Bass Womb RoomxMx

Original post on Picnob

item.title: JENNIFER FINCHA rare and gorgeous powerful bird has taken flight...
item.description: JENNIFER FINCHA rare and gorgeous powerful bird has taken flight. Fellow rhythm sister, rock pioneer, photographer, powerhouse, kind hearted, goddess.In 1992, high on magical fungi, I first watched L7. Loud. Heavy. Riffs. Finch head banging in a bikini top. Direct and deep seduction for me to join the ranks.Bricks Are Heavy.Earthly Warrior Goddess lost.See HER on the other side.xMx

item.title: @xmadmx reflects on the handwritten letter Courtney Love sent af...
item.description: @xmadmx reflects on the handwritten letter Courtney Love sent after she left Hole...Tune into Melissa's conversation with @itsjrichmond on Broken Record to hear more about her books Even the Good Girls Will Cry and My 90's Rock Photographs, the rise of alternative music, her evolving relationship with Courtney Love, and more. Listen wherever you get your podcasts. #CourtneyLove #90sMusic

item.title: ⭐️ THIS EVENT IS NOW FULL. Visit titcombsbookshop.com/events to ...
item.description:
⭐️ THIS EVENT IS NOW FULL. Visit titcombsbookshop.com/events to join the waitlist! ⭐️Titcomb’s Bookshop is thrilled to present Melissa Auf der Maur, bass player for Hole and The Smashing Pumpkins, to discuss her ‘90s rock memoir EVEN THE GOOD GIRLS WILL CRY on Tuesday, July 21st at 6:30pm.EVEN THE GOOD GIRLS WILL CRY is a remarkably open-hearted, clear-eyed memoir of the ‘90s Alternative era by the bassist of Hole and The Smashing Pumpkins. Part rock memoir, part travel diary, part psychedelic scrapbook, it is a vivid dispatch from the last analog decade, artistically capturing that bygone era in all its messy, angsty glory.Can’t make it? Call Titcomb’s Bookshop at 508-888-2331 to reserve a signed copy of the book!

Original post on Picnob

item.title: Back home, bathing in the Summer Solstice and Strawberry Full Mo...
item.description: Back home, bathing in the Summer Solstice and Strawberry Full Moon afterglow … reintegrating post memoir deep seeded exchange, while birthing the design / installation plan for my 90s photography exhibit coming up at @agotoronto come September in Toronto… (Montréal art school student dream come true!)Meanwhile back home, @basilicahudson which was inspired by a dream I about temple of three-dimensional sound, is weaving its magic with independent day Farm & Flea weekend, in collaboration with @likemindedobjects brings together more than 100 local independent makers, farmers, and artists collectors.No barcodes and Delicious abundance of the Hudson Valley … join us!Sat / Sun July 4&5, 10-5pmIn the spirited white cube Basilica Back Gallery, exhibited through the weekend is The Swan Script curated by @__the__sphinx__ - last week’s opening ceremony, part of @upstateartweekend was divine incarnate. Circles, Readings, Magic and Music - the paintings and sculptures are still up and must see if you are in Hudson, NY this hot weekend…When we founded basilica Hudson in 2010, if we’d been asked what we hoped to fill it with, I most certainly would’ve said “witches, illusionists, dreamers, one-of-a-kind makers and cellists” … and so we have fulfilled that wish, with all kindred spirits... night sky MAdM captured by @heathendude.Long hot days welcome you to stay strange but don’t be a stranger…Much on the archives horizon…including substack soliloquies…& more to share connect with YOU.xMx

item.title: REAL VINTAGEOne of a kindOnly one in the roomWhat’s a woman in h...
item.description: REAL VINTAGEOne of a kindOnly one in the roomWhat’s a woman in her 50s to do?Ask Lena Dunham? Funny, but it happened organically, as they say.….Accidental insight found in SOHO last week … Fashion brains of @lenadunham and @kristennaiman chime in on new designers and how second-hand-new could speak to my vintage obsession…Long live 1880-1980s rags is what I say!!!Tune in to the live taping of the JOY OF WEARING VINTAGE fab conversation between Kristen & Lena via @therealreal REAL TALK podcast!Alongside my 90s memoir, more is to come, in addition to my 90s rock photography and museum exhibit…. My 90s closet is getting a purge, stay tuned. This fall I’ll be sharing tales and shedding some well loved pieces from the decade long gone. Tea with fashion experts with podcasts on the horizon.xMx

item.title: So honored to curate and collaborate with so many luminaries at ...
item.description: So honored to curate and collaborate with so many luminaries at once — deep thanks to @danasherwoodstudio , @maxrazdow , @rachel__cope , @xmadmx , @phantasmaphile , @rasputina_official and @jeanetteandrewsmagic and to all who visited during @upstateartweekend . Thank you Melissa Auf der Maur for welcoming us at Basilica Hudson and collaborating. Thrilled that Swan’s Script I, curated by @__the__sphinx__ will remain open at @basilicahudson next weekend, July 4-5. And please join The Swan’s Script II at @gearycontemporary July 15-18 and The Swan’s Script III at @dimin.nyc August 6-28. Happy full strawberry moon!
